title: Brassavola rigida
taxonomy: Brassavola rigida is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the broader group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Brassavola rigida is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae. More specifically, it is placed within the tribe Cymbidieae and then the subtribe Cymbidiinae. This detailed classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
